sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ عَلِيٌّ إِلَى الْبَقَّالَةِ لِيَشْتَرِيَ الْحَلِيبَ.
sentences.translation: Ali je otišao u prodavnicu da kupi mlijeko.
sentences.translationEn: Ali went to the grocery store to buy milk.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَ أَيْضًا زُبْدَةً وَبَيْضًا وَعَصِيرَ بُرْتُقَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Uzeo je i maslac, jaja i sok od narandže.
sentences.translationEn: He also took butter, eggs, and orange juice.

sentences.translation: Platio je i izašao iz prodavnice.
sentences.translationEn: He paid and left the store.

sentences.arabic: رَجَعَ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ وَوَضَعَ الْأَشْيَاءَ فِي الثَّلَّاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vratio se kući i stavio stvari u frižider.
sentences.translationEn: He returned home and put the items in the fridge.
